title: justicia linearis
intro: Justicia linearis, also known as Narrow-leaved Justicia, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Justicia linearis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing inflammation and protecting the body from oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Justicia linearis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of common cold, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
